title: Almost had you, My child.
description: Make Jesus Christ appear when you are close to death.
body:
**Makes Jesus Christ appear over your screen when you are close to death.**

Inspired by [invisual](https://www.tiktok.com/@______invisual________)'s shitposts.

![A Minecraft player fighting a skeleton and a zombie, with a photo of Jesus Christ fading in while they are low health. The player promptly dies.](https://i.ibb.co/1vLYQQK/Base-Profile2024-09-15-16-01-13-27-ezgif-com-video-to-gif-converter.gif)

**This mod will work with most GUI Scale settings, however, you may choose a resource pack to better fit your scale settings!** Optional Resource packs can be found inside of Mod Versions tab.
Multiplayer **should work,** assuming both the clients and the server have the mod/pack installed.
